recommendations.title: The Quiet
recommendations.overview: After her widowed father dies, deaf teenager Dot moves in with her godparents, Olivia and Paul Deer. The Deers' daughter, Nina, is openly hostile to Dot, but that does not prevent her from telling her secrets to her silent stepsister, including the f

recommendations.title: Addicted to Fresno
recommendations.overview: Two co-dependent sisters, a recovering sex addict and a lonely lesbian who work as hotel maids in Fresno, go to ludicrous lengths to cover up an accidental crime.

recommendations.title: But I'm a Cheerleader
recommendations.overview: Megan is an all-American girl. A cheerleader. She has a boyfriend. But Megan doesn't like kissing her boyfriend very much. And she's pretty touchy with her cheerleader friends. Her conservative parents worry that she must be a lesbian and send her of

recommendations.title: The Stand In
recommendations.overview: When ordered to serve a year in rehab, actress Candy hires her on-set stand-in to take her place. The unassuming woman flips the script and steals her identity, career and boyfriend in this hilarious comedy about trading places.

recommendations.title: In the Blood
recommendations.overview: When her husband goes missing during their Caribbean vacation, a woman sets off on her own to take down the men she thinks are responsible.

recommendations.title: Crazy/Beautiful
recommendations.overview: At Pacific Palisades High, a poor Latino falls hard for a troubled girl from the affluent neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Rope
recommendations.overview: Two young men attempt to prove they committed the perfect murder by hosting a dinner party for the family of a classmate they just strangled to death.

recommendations.title: Armed Response
recommendations.overview: The story follows a team of highly trained operatives who find themselves trapped inside an isolated military compound.

recommendations.title: Kid Cannabis
recommendations.overview: An eighteen year old high school drop out and his twenty-seven year old friend start trafficking marijuana across the border of Canada in order to make money and their lives are changed forever.

recommendations.title: The Hands of Orlac
recommendations.overview: A world-famous pianist loses both hands in an accident. When new hands are grafted on, he is horrified to learn they once belonged to a murderer.
